approval_scope: No approval granted. This worker request is a local conversion artifact only; execution requires separate approval and assignment.
objective: After explicit approval only, read public Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy, and PromptBase marketplace pages for terms, fees, payouts, listing requirements, refund constraints, prohibited content, and seller requirements relevant to Agent Skill Starter Kit.
allowed_actions: Open public pages on allowed hosts after approval
Follow public help, documentation, pricing, fees, terms, refund, payout, seller, and prohibited-content links on allowed hosts
Record source URLs and page titles
Summarize factual marketplace requirements with short compliant excerpts only
Capture local Markdown notes and optional screenshots
prohibited_actions: entering credentials, OTPs, payment details, personal data, private files, or wallet information
bypassing paywalls, rate limits, access controls, or platform rules
stop_conditions: The source service request is not approved and assigned
Any page asks for login, signup, account creation, seller onboarding, consent acceptance, payment, tax, KYC, private data, credentials, OTP, wallet action, or file upload
A required page is not public or requires a signed-in state
A link leaves the allowed hosts
The browser worker cannot distinguish public guidance from contractual acceptance
The task would require a public action, marketplace listing, or real-money/payment action

credential_boundary.notes: No credentials, OTPs, personal/private data, private files, secrets, or payment details may be entered or stored.

account_boundary.notes: No signed-in pages, registration, settings, seller onboarding, or terms acceptance.

money_boundary.notes: No real-money, payment-method, wallet, purchase, or transaction action.

public_action_boundary.notes: No public posts, comments, messages, listings, uploads, PR/issue actions, or submissions.

allowed_data_types: local screenshot if approval permits browser capture

replay_requires_new_approval_when: service request status is not approved or assigned
allowed hosts, starting URLs, prohibited actions, or risk gate change
worker would use signed-in state, submit a form, accept terms, create an account, upload/list a product, or touch payment/tax/KYC/wallet data
more than one weekly source freshness window has elapsed since approval
